message:
feat(tui): Add HGT passport overlay component for genomic island visualization

Implement a terminal-based visualization for horizontal gene transfer
analysis results, displaying genomic islands with amelioration status,
donor candidates, and HGT hallmark genes.

New component: packages/tui/src/components/HGTOverlay.tsx (108 lines)

Visual Layout:
┌══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
│ HGT PASSPORT — [phage name]                              Esc/H to close     │
│                                                                              │
│ Genome GC [xx.x]%                                                           │
│                                                                              │
│ Islands                                                                      │
│ ░░░░░█████░░░▓▓▓░░░░░░░░▒▒▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░            │
│ █ recent ▓ intermediate ▒ ancient                                           │
│                                                                              │
│ Recent: N  Intermediate: N  Ancient: N                                      │
│                                                                              │
│ [1] start–end bp · ΔGC +x.x%                                                │
│     Amelioration: recent · Donor: taxon (xx.x%)                             │
│     Hallmarks: integrase, tail fiber, ...                                   │
│ ...                                                                          │
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

Key Features:
- islandBar(): Renders 60-character genome bar with islands marked by
  amelioration state (█ recent, ▓ intermediate, ▒ ancient, ░ native)
- Summary counts: Quick tally of islands by amelioration category
- Island details: Position, GC delta, amelioration state, best donor match
- Hallmark genes: Lists detected HGT markers (integrases, etc.)
- Keyboard: Esc or H to close overlay

Data Flow:
- Reads HGTAnalysis from overlayData.hgt in Zustand store
- Uses currentPhage for genome metadata (name, length)
- Retrieves theme colors for styled terminal rendering

Component Structure:
- useInput hook for keyboard handling (escape/H to close)
- useMemo for summary statistics computation
- Defensive rendering if no HGT data or phage available
- Limits display to first 4 islands with "...N more" indicator

This provides a "genomic passport" metaphor for viewing HGT events,
showing where foreign DNA has integrated and visualizing the timeline
of acquisition based on compositional amelioration.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
